name_en: M25445 Black Crocodile This Slim Trunk handbag draws inspiration from Louis Vuitton's traditional trunks, featuring a nail-studded border and metal S-lock clasp to showcase a rock-chic style. The shiny chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering multiple carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
